source_sections: generated in step 2
row_filter_logic: all planned artifacts
generation_rule: CSV version of artifact generation map.
notes: Created in this step.

source_sections: generated in step 2
row_filter_logic: all planned artifacts
generation_rule: Machine-readable map of all target artifacts and source filters.
notes: Created in this step.

source_sections: derived from workflow state
row_filter_logic: merge completed; artifact map completed; JSON/MD pack pending; ZIP pending
generation_rule: Write status report with completed/pending summary and next steps.
notes: Created in this step.

source_sections: 02 Actors
row_filter_logic: section == '02 Actors'
generation_rule: Group rows by actor; generate actor objects with type, login requirement, dashboard requirement, data scope, allowed creates and forbidden actions.
notes: Used by roles, workflows, screens and tests.

source_sections: 01 Business Context
row_filter_logic: section == '01 Business Context'
generation_rule: Write a concise BRD narrative using each question/answer row, preserving IDs as traceable anchors.
notes: Human-readable context for agents.

source_sections: 04 Domain Dictionary; 13 Files and Documents
row_filter_logic: section == '04 Domain Dictionary' OR (section == '13 Files and Documents' AND decision_type == 'document')
generation_rule: Generate canonical business dictionary with terms, types, definitions, identifiers, mapped entities and document terms.
notes: ISO 20022-inspired business/data dictionary.

source_sections: 12 Integrations
row_filter_logic: section == '12 Integrations'
generation_rule: Group integration rows by module; generate integration registry with purpose, priority, data direction, auth/security and tests.
notes: Runtime + development tool integrations.

source_sections: 03 Roles and Permissions
row_filter_logic: section == '03 Roles and Permissions'
generation_rule: Generate permission rules and negative access policies; include public access restrictions and delete restrictions.
notes: Can be converted into Directus permissions.

source_sections: 00 Project Manifest
source_decision_types: identity; ownership; scope; architecture; deployment; standard; governance; security; milestone; privacy; build_runbook
row_filter_logic: section == '00 Project Manifest'
generation_rule: Convert project identity, architecture, scope, modularity, versioning, security baseline, milestones and build approach rows into a single project manifest object.
notes: Root config consumed by all later artifacts.

source_sections: 03 Roles and Permissions
row_filter_logic: section == '03 Roles and Permissions' AND module == 'roles'
generation_rule: Group rows by actor/role; generate role definitions with scope, collection access, field restrictions and policy summary.
notes: Role definitions before access matrix.

source_sections: 05 Data Schema
row_filter_logic: section == '05 Data Schema'
generation_rule: Group rows by entity/collection; generate full consolidated schema with fields, types, rules, security levels and relationships.
notes: Consolidated schema; module schemas will be split from this.

source_sections: 09 Status and Response Codes
row_filter_logic: section == '09 Status and Response Codes'
generation_rule: Group by module/status group and generate controlled lifecycle and API response code lists.
notes: Used by workflow state machines and UI badges.

source_sections: 03 Roles and Permissions; 15 Security Hardening
row_filter_logic: section in ['03 Roles and Permissions','15 Security Hardening'] AND decision_type in ['permission','security_rule','security_control']
generation_rule: Generate role-by-entity access matrix with read/create/update/delete/export/field restrictions and scope rules.
notes: Central security artifact.

source_sections: 15 Security Hardening; 17 Audit Reconciliation and Reversal
row_filter_logic: section in ['15 Security Hardening','17 Audit Reconciliation and Reversal']
generation_rule: Generate audit rules, audit event fields, critical action list and download/export logging rules.
notes: Shared audit rules across modules.

source_sections: 04 Domain Dictionary; 05 Data Schema; 15 Security Hardening; 16 Privacy and Children's Data
row_filter_logic: security_level in ['public','internal','sensitive','restricted']
generation_rule: Generate data classes and map each field/entity/document to public/internal/sensitive/restricted handling.
notes: Needed for permission generation.

source_sections: 16 Privacy and Children's Data
row_filter_logic: section == "16 Privacy and Children's Data"
generation_rule: Generate privacy policy rules for data minimisation, children's data, consent, public certificate fields, exports, retention and staging data.
notes: MVP privacy constraints.

source_sections: 12 Integrations; 15 Security Hardening; 20 Deployment and Operations Runbook
row_filter_logic: module contains secrets/env/integration rows OR decision_type in ['Environment variable','integration_security']
generation_rule: Generate server-side secrets policy, env var list, no-browser-secrets rules and deployment handling.
notes: Required before frontend/API generation.

source_sections: 00 Project Manifest; 15 Security Hardening
row_filter_logic: section in ['00 Project Manifest','15 Security Hardening']
generation_rule: Generate deny-by-default, auth, authorisation, file, API, audit, rate limiting and safe error baseline.
notes: Mandatory production safety artifact.

source_sections: 15 Security Hardening; 16 Privacy and Children's Data; 17 Audit Reconciliation and Reversal
row_filter_logic: section in ['15 Security Hardening',"16 Privacy and Children's Data",'17 Audit Reconciliation and Reversal']
generation_rule: Write a threat model summarising key risks: cross-school access, file leakage, payment webhook tampering, public verification abuse, result/certificate tampering and secret leakage.
notes: Human-readable security context for reviewers.

source_sections: 00 Project Manifest; 15 Security Hardening; 19 Build Instructions and Runbook
row_filter_logic: section in ['00 Project Manifest','15 Security Hardening','19 Build Instructions and Runbook'] AND answer/build_instruction references change, overwrite, approval, version, migration or rollback
generation_rule: Generate change-control rules, approval gates, schema migration requirements, regression requirements and version policy.
notes: Future continuity artifact.

source_sections: 19 Build Instructions and Runbook; 20 Deployment and Operations Runbook
row_filter_logic: module in ['generate_release_notes','final_readiness_report'] OR decision_type == 'go_live_check'
generation_rule: Create initial release notes template with sections for generated artifacts, tests, open assumptions, manual approvals and go-live status.
notes: Template only at map stage.
